Rate & Review For All Episodes (Go Here To Rate/Review Any Episode)

  • Thread starter Cole
  • Start date Feb 10, 2003
Status
Not open for further replies.

Cole

where is everyone
Joined
Nov 21, 2001
Messages
1,664
Location
huntsville, al
  • Feb 10, 2003
  • #1
Here you will find a list of every Rate & Review thread/poll conducted for every Simpsons episode. Polls for seasons 13-16 were conducted on the original airdate of those episodes. Thanks to Channel Surfer for his help in archiving the Season 13 threads. Thanks to Mike Scully as well for his work with Season 16-17. Thanks to Nameless, Adam R, Simpsons Forever, and Ryan, for helping to archive the seasons 1-12 threads.

If you wish to rate/review an episode, select an episode here and write your review! If a thread is closed, please contact a mod to open it.

Season 1
Simpsons Roasting On An Open Fire
Bart the Genius
Homer's Odyssey
There's No Disgrace Like Home
Bart the General
Moaning Lisa
Call of the Simpsons
The Telltale Head
Life on the Fast Lane
Homer's Night Out
The Crepes of Wrath
Krusty Gets Busted
Some Enchanted Evening
